exception.exception_value: [WinError 32] The process cannot access the file because it is being used by another process: 'C:\\Users\\Oliver\\Development\\postal-gambit\\dist-installer.build\\app.onefile-build\\blobs\\__payload.bin'

nuitka-compilation-report.exception:
Traceback (most recent call last): File "C:\Users\Oliver\Development\postal-gambit\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka\MainControl.py", line 1385, in main _main() ~~~~~^^ File "C:\Users\Oliver\Development\postal-gambit\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka\MainControl.py", line 1283, in _main packDistFolderToOnefile(dist_dir) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\Oliver\Development\postal-gambit\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka reezer\Onefile.py", line 81, in packDistFolderToOnefile packDistFolderToOnefileBootstrap( ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^ onefile_output_filename=onefile_output_filename, ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ dist_dir=dist_dir, ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ start_binary=start_binary, ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ) ^ File "C:\Users\Oliver\Development\postal-gambit\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka reezer\Onefile.py", line 260, in packDistFolderToOnefileBootstrap cleanSconsDirectory(source_dir) ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\Oliver\Development\postal-gambit\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka uild\SconsInterface.py", line 667, in cleanSconsDirectory check(path) ~~~~~^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\Oliver\Development\postal-gambit\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka uild\SconsInterface.py", line 645, in check deleteFile(path, must_exist=True) ~~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\Oliver\Development\postal-gambit\venv\Lib\site-packages
uitka\utils\FileOperations.py", line 877, in deleteFile os.unlink(path) ~~~~~~~~~^^^^^^ PermissionError: [WinError 32] The process cannot access the file because it is being used by another process: 'C:\Users\Oliver\Development\postal-gambit\dist-installer.build\app.onefile-build\blobs\__payload.bin'

module.name: PySide6
module.reason: Included to allow post load workaround code.

module.name: PySide6-postLoad
module.reason: According to Yaml 'post-import-code' configuration. Loading Qt application icon from Windows resources.

module.name: PySide6-preLoad
module.reason: Adding binary folder to runtime 'PATH' environment variable for proper Qt loading.

module.name: PySide6.QtCore
module.reason: Extension module needed for standalone mode.

module.name: PySide6.QtCore-postLoad
module.reason: Setting Qt library path to distribution folder. We need to avoid loading target system Qt plugins, which may be from another Qt version.

module.reason: Extension module needed for standalone mode.
